description_long: This rustic wooden cabin features a simple rectangular structure with a gable metal roof and weathered wooden plank walls. The front of the cabin has a single wooden door, slightly ajar, revealing a dark interior. Surrounding the cabin are several props: a small rowboat with wooden seats, a tree stump with an axe embedded in it, a log, and wooden crates filled with bottles. The cabin's exterior is devoid of windows, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The roof is made of corrugated metal sheets, providing a stark contrast to the natural wood textures. The overall scene evokes a rural or lakeside setting, with the cabin serving as a modest shelter.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a metal gable roof, a single front door, and surrounded by a rowboat, crates, and a tree stump with an axe. The structure is simple and windowless, emphasizing a utilitarian, rural aesthetic.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open wooden door, crates with bottles, the tree stump with an axe, and the rowboat positioned to the right of the cabin.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the rowboat's interior and the cabin's wooden plank walls, with the door partially visible and the stump and log in the foreground.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the cabin, showing the full extent of the wooden plank siding and the rowboat closely adjacent, with the stump and log visible at the side.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the crates with bottles, the closed side of the cabin, and the metal roof, with the rowboat partially visible behind the structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal sheets and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: No windows are visible on any side of the cabin; the structure appears completely windowless.
attribute_door_placement: A single wooden door is located on the front facade, slightly offset to the right.
